description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a REGISTRY variable set to registry.gitlab.com. Define a single stage called buildpush and a job named buildpush that runs in this stage. In the before_script, log in to the registry with docker login using $CI_BUILD_USER and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then display RAM and CPU info with free -m and cat /proc/cpuinfo. The job script extracts the version from package.json, formats the current date-time, builds a Docker image tagged ${REGISTRY}/checkmein2/checkmein2-ui:${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${CI_VERSION}-${CI_DATE_TIME}, lists all images, and pushes the image to the registry. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
